calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, Anchor General Insurance Co.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Dominque Sade Shelton.
Defult of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 10 dismissed without prejudice.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $26,252.62
Pre-Judgment Interest: $3,038.12
Costs: $807.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $30,097.74
Judgment signed in open court.
